ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "day" TEXT /* Date of the energy consumption data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the energy consumption data */,
  "mv" REAL /* Energy consumption in megavolt (MV) */,
  "max_load" REAL /* Maximum load in kilowatts (kW) */,
  "min_load" REAL /* Minimum load in kilowatts (kW) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the energy data was collected */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the energy data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., smart meter, weather station, IoT device) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  "energy_savings_goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy savings goal associated with the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_energy_savings_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_savings_goal_id") REFERENCES energy_savings_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_savings_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy savings goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy savings goal */,
  "target_reduction" REAL /* Target reduction in energy consumption */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the energy savings goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the energy savings goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress toward the energy savings goal */,
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incentive associated with the energy savings goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_savings_goals_incentive_id FOREIGN KEY ("incentive_id") REFERENCES incentives ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered to customers who achieve the energy savings goal */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., discount, rebate, free service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
